title: englerina collinsii
intro: Englerina collinsii, also known as a species of flowering plant in the family Rhamnaceae, is a type of shrub native to the tropical regions of Africa. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Englerina collinsii include reducing fever, treating wounds, and relieving respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or topical applications, and its extracts are also used in traditional medicine.
